subcodes.first_line: O assured leaf! Be joyous and free, and rest confident in the grace and bounty of the Lord, Who hath guided thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه موقنه شاد باش و آزاد باش و مطمئن بفضل و موهبت پروردگار که ترا هدایت
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
